subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150529948 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 454632311/150529948
at 22:45:08.02 UT on the 24th of May 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles.�
